name: Freestyle Park Pro
tagline: True twin built for park, rails and street
description: A true-twin park board with a consistent flex pattern tip-to-tail and impact-reinforced zones. Built for park laps, jib lines and street riding with durable construction that takes repeated impact.

specs.label: Construction
specs.value: Full cap with reinforced impact zones

specs.label: Size 152
specs.value: EFF 113cm · 28.5/25.0/28.5mm · 7.2m · Stance Centred · Setback 0" · 110–170+ lbs / 50–77+ kg

highlights: Reinforced nose and tail impact zones
